description: Effective Number of Codons (Wright's Nc) for a coding sequence, clamped to 20..61.

enc.description: Effective Number of Codons, 20..61 (20 = extreme bias, 61 = no bias).

errors.message: Sequence cannot be null or empty

input.sequence: TTTx4 TTC CTGx3 CTCx2 TTA ATTx3 ATCx2 ATA GTGx4 GTC AGCx3 TCTx2 TCA CGCx4 CGTx2 GGCx3 GGTx2 GGA (concatenated codons)

examples.name: Mixed short gene stays in range
